---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a bug to help us improve Visus"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Sequential steps to reproduce the unexpected behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See the error at '...'

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen during a normal session.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings (if applicable)
Add screenshots or video recordings to help visually diagnose the issue.

## Device Environment (Multi-device & PWA context)
- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 15, MacBook Pro, Pixel 8]
- **Operating System**: [e.g. iOS 17, macOS Sonoma, Windows 11]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Safari, Chrome, Firefox]
- **Display Mode**: [e.g. Installed PWA, Mobile Web Browser, Desktop Web Browser]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem or development console logs here.
